sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel data documented in sources

special_mechanics.name: Double Jump
special_mechanics.description: Batman can perform a double jump by pressing the jump button twice

special_mechanics.name: Equipment-Based Mobility
special_mechanics.description: Batman uses gadgets including grappling hook for traversal across levels

special_mechanics.name: Combat Movement
special_mechanics.description: Batman can attack, dodge, and block attacks during platforming sections

tier_notes: Tier 2 (empirical/qualitative): No precise physics parameters documented in available sources. Sources contain game structure, level design, and gameplay mechanics description but lack quantified movement values, gravity constants, or sub-pixel system details.
sources_used: tcrf.net - The Cutting Room Floor (stage select data, hidden mechanics)
